title: tellima tenella
intro: Tellima tenella, also known as fringe-cup, is a flowering plant species belonging to the saxifrage family. The medicinal properties of this plant make it useful in treating various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Tellima tenella include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to promote wound healing and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Tellima tenella can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
